mechanism: covalent (vinyl sulfone Michael acceptor at Cys727)
inchi_key: UWPFUBNCDABUEE-SIFUEBAJSA-N (parent, allyl) | DBNMEVJJGIPVCE-UHFFFAOYSA-N (X1L, reduced adduct — skeleton match)
reference_paper_title: Chemoproteomic discovery of a covalent allosteric inhibitor of WRN helicase.
validated_source: RCSB CCD X1L (covalent-adduct form) + PubChem name synonym match; skeleton match (InChIKey[:14]) between parent and post-Michael-addition form
notes: Parent VVD-214 has vinyl sulfone C=C which is reduced to C-C after covalent attack on Cys727. X1L represents the covalently bound form as extracted from the cocrystal. 7GQU is the Baltgalvis et al. Nature 2024 WRN covalent allosteric inhibitor cocrystal. X1L represents the covalently bound adduct form of the VVD-214 / RO-7589831 chemotype after Cys727 addition to the vinyl sulfone warhead.
